titleStmt.title: SII 10.738: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 738. (A.R. No. 822 of 1922.) ON A SLAB LEANING AGAINST THE NORTH WALL OF THE TEMPLE OF AGASTYĒŚVARA, KOMMŪRU, BAPATLA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Date lost.

summary.p: Records the gift by Beharā-Mahāpātra Bāhubalēndra-Mahāpātra, of the entire parīksha-basāṇam in the villages of Kommūru, Vorugāṇḍi, Rāvipāḍu and Gōṅgulamūṇḍi in the Durgāprasāda-Koṇḍavīḍu daṇḍapāṭa for the offerings of god Mallikārjuna at Śrīparvata. The gift was made with the consent of Pratāparudradēva-Gajapati.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
lguṇa
15sō śrīmallikā¨rjunadē
vara divyaśrīpādapadmālaku śrībāri
mādābeharāmahāpātra śrībā
hubaḷaḷēṁdramahāpātruluṁgā
ru śatasahasradaṁḍḍapraṇāmamu sēsi I
ccina dha¨rmmaśāsanapatraṁ . śrīpratāparu
dradēvugajapati mahārāyaluṁgā
ru du¨rggāprasāda koṁḍḍavīḍudaṁḍapā
ṭalōnu Amṛtapaḷlakuṁ jellivacci ko
mmūru . vorugāṁḍi . rāvipāḍu . gōṁgu
lamūṁḍi . yīnālugugrāmālalōnu
du¨rggāprasāda koṁḍḍavīṭidaṁḍḍapāṭapa
rīkṣabasāṇaṁ yaṁtavaṭṭu Aṁtavaṭṭunu śrī
pa¨rvvatāla mallikā¨rjunadēvaraku Amṛtapaḷlaku
sama¨rppaṇa sēstimi . pratāparudradēvugajapatima
hārāyalu yaṁtagālamu sāgiṁccenu (A)
Aṁttakālamun sāgistimi yābasāṇaṁ
yēparīkṣagonnānu śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvara
ku tappu [U]rakuruparumēśvaru yiccina grāmālugā
nni Āyanavullankhistēnu yavvarunnu ka¨rtalugā
ru yāparīkṣatappinānu Āpāpānaṁbōvuvāṁ
ḍḍu yiṁdduku yavvaru tappinānu vāraṇāśi
lōnu gōbrāhmalaku tappina pāpānaṁ
bōvuvāru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
Digital edition of SII 10.738 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
